t‾MI I [‾. 2( I 0 )/2008-11;'1 ‾ 11;'1 t 'llfffi:ft] '11>1<1 1;lffi' 3l'R Wqq MINISTRY OF MICRO, SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES NOTIF1CATION New Delhi, the 7th September, 2009 S.O. 2315(E).-In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of Section 7 of the Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act, 2006 (27 of2006), the Central Goverrunent hereby constitutes an Advisory Committee consisting of the following members, namelY::- A. Secretary to the Goverrunent -{:hairperson, of india, Ministry ofMicro, Small ex-officio and Medium Enterprises. B. Five officers of the Central Government possessing necessary expertise in matters relating to micro, small and medium enterprises:- (1) Secretary to the Goverrunent oflndia, -Member, Department of Commerce, Ministry of Commerce and Industry. (2) Secretary to the Government of India, -Member, Ministry of Food Processing ex-officio Industries. (3) Secretary to the Government oflndia, Member, Ministry of Labour and Employment. ex-officio (4) Secretary to the Government of India, -Member, Department of Revenue, Ministry of ex-officio Finance. (5) Adviser (Village and Small Enterprises), -Member, Planning Commission, Government of ex-officio India. C. Three representatives of the State Goverrunent :- (1) Principal Secretary/Secretary to the -Member, Government of Punjab, dealing with ex-officio small scale industries or micro, small and medium enterprises. (2) Principal Secretary/Secretary to the Government of Jharkhand, dealing. with small scale industries or micro, small and medium enterprises. (3) Principal Secretary/Secretary to the Government ofGujarat, dealing with small scale industries or micro, small and medium enterprises. -Member, ex-officio -Member, ex-officio D. Three representatives of the associations of micro, small and medium enterprises :- (I) President, Karnataka Small Scale Industries Association (KASSIA), 17 Cross, Magadi Chord Road, Vijaynagar, Baogalore-560 055, Kamataka. -Member, ex-officio (2) President, -Member, Chamber of Small Industries ex-officio AsSOC:iation (COSlA), TSSIA House, Plot No. P-26, Road 16/T, Wagle Industrial Estate, Thane-400 604, Maharashtra. (3) President. Confederation of indian Industries 23, Institutional Area, Lodhi Road, NewDelhi-110003. -Member, ex-officio 2. The Additional Secretary to Goverrunent oflndia and Development Commissioner (Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises), Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, who is the Member:Secretary of the Board, shall be ex-officio Member-Secretary of the Advisory Committee. 3. The term of the Advisory Committee shall be for a period of two years from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette. [No. 2(10)/2008-MSME Policy] MADHAV LAL, Add!.
